name: BCC_FirstRecipientOnly
rule_description: BccEmails is set only for the first recipient in a multi-recipient call. For all subsequent recipients, BccEmails is explicitly set to null. Enforced via bool first=true flag; first is set to false after first iteration.

name: SubjectMaxLength200
rule_description: Email subject is truncated to 200 characters before being stored on EmailMessage. The original subject parameter value is never stored if it exceeds 200 chars.

name: ReplyToMaxLength200
rule_description: ReplyTo address is truncated to 200 characters before being stored on EmailMessage.

name: InitialStatus_AttachmentsImporting
rule_description: EmailMessage initial Status is set to Importing (not Queued) when hasAttachments=true. Status transitions to Queued only after attachments have been successfully written to DB via InsertEmailAttachments(). If no attachments, Status is set to Queued directly.

name: TemplatePlaceholderFormat
rule_description: Template placeholder format is $$KEY$$ (double-dollar, uppercase key, closing double-dollar). Replacement is performed case-insensitively using StringComparison.InvariantCultureIgnoreCase. Content template is injected into master template via $$MAIN_CONTENT$$. Additional placeholders: $$COMPANYNAME$$, $$PRODUCTNAME$$, $$BASEURL$$, $$SUPPORTMAIL$$.

name: StatusNoDowngrade_AlwaysChange
rule_description: Status updates to Opened, SpamReport, or Clicked always overwrite any existing status. Enforced by AlwaysChangeStatuses = Array.Empty<EmailStatus>(), meaning no statuses are excluded from being overwritten. The repository UpdateEmailMessageStatuses skips records whose current status is in the overwritingStatuses exclusion list â€” an empty list excludes nothing.

name: StatusNoDowngrade_DeliveredCannotOverwriteOpened
rule_description: Status update to Delivered cannot overwrite a message already in Opened status. Enforced by DeliveredNoChangeStatuses = new[] { EmailStatus.Opened } â€” records currently in Opened status are excluded from the batch update.

definition_location.note: private static IEnumerable<EmailStatus> DeliveredNoChangeStatuses = new[] { EmailStatus.Opened }

name: StatusNoDowngrade_DefaultCannotOverwriteTerminalStatuses
rule_description: Default status updates (any status not Opened, SpamReport, Clicked, or Delivered) cannot overwrite a message already in Delivered, Opened, or SpamReport status. Enforced by DefaultNoChangeStatuses = new[] { EmailStatus.Delivered, EmailStatus.Opened, EmailStatus.SpamReport }.

definition_location.note: private static IEnumerable<EmailStatus> DefaultNoChangeStatuses = new[] { EmailStatus.Delivered, EmailStatus.Opened, EmailStatus.SpamReport }

name: RetryStateTransition
rule_description: On SendGrid API failure (HTTP >= 400), EmailMessage status progresses through exactly 3 retry stages before terminal failure: SendingToGateway -> QueuedFirstRetry -> QueuedSecondRetry -> QueuedThirdRetry -> SentToGatewayFailed. Any unexpected status also results in SentToGatewayFailed (default case). PriorityOrder is incremented on each failure.

name: ValidationError_EmptyBodyOrSubject
rule_description: If EmailMessage.Body or EmailMessage.Subject is null or empty, Status is set to ValidationError and the message is NOT dispatched to SendGrid. The send attempt is skipped entirely â€” no API call is made.

name: InvalidEmail_ValidateEmailsFails
rule_description: If Tools.ValidateEmails(mail.ToEmail) returns false, Status is set to InvalidEmail and the message is NOT dispatched to SendGrid. No API call is made.

name: AttachmentFileMissing_SentToGatewayFailed
rule_description: If a blob attachment file does not exist on disk when email is being processed (File.Exists returns false), Status is set to SentToGatewayFailed immediately and the email is NOT sent. UpdateEmailMessage is called synchronously inside the attachment loop.

name: TestMode_SentToGatewaySandbox
rule_description: If EmailMessage.TestMode=true and SendGrid API returns success (HTTP < 400), Status is set to SentToGatewaySandbox instead of SentToGateway. X-Message-Id is still stored. This is a terminal non-error status indicating the message was dispatched in test mode.

name: DisableMessageBackgroundService_Toggle
rule_description: If AppSetting DisableMessageBackgroundService has value '1' (Ordinal string comparison), DoWorkAsync() returns immediately without processing any emails. Default value checked is '1'. This prevents the background service from running, typically used on dev environments pointing to production DB.

name: DisableAllBroadcasts_Toggle
rule_description: If AppSetting DisableAllBroadcasts has value '1' (Ordinal string comparison) at the start of a processing loop iteration, the iteration is skipped via continue. The background service remains running and continues waiting for new channel signals â€” it does not exit. Checked per-iteration inside the while loop.

name: SendFast_ImmediateChannelQueueAfterDbInsert
rule_description: If sendFast=true, ISingleSendGridProcessingChannel.QueueMessages() is called with the IDs of all persisted EmailMessages immediately after BulkInsertEmailMessages(). This occurs only after DB insert is complete. If sendFast=false (default), no channel signal is sent and messages are processed only by the scheduled batch job.

name: CrossDomain_SmsLogStatuses_WrittenOnlyIfSmsLogIdValid
rule_description: After EmailMessage status is updated via webhook: a cross-domain write to SmsLogStatuses is performed ONLY if (1) the email status was actually changed by the DB update (updatedIds contains the ID) AND (2) the value.SmsLogId can be parsed as a valid long. If SmsLogId is null, empty, or non-numeric, no SmsLog write occurs. The write is batched: _messageRepository.CreateSmsLogStatuses() is called once with all qualifying statuses.

write_location.note: _messageRepository.CreateSmsLogStatuses() â€” cross-domain write to SmsLog domain
